summary: EX-19.1 9 betr-insidertradingpolicy2.htm EX-19.1 Document Insider Trading Policy Summary The Insider Trading Policy (the Policy) explains the policy of Better (as defined below) with respect to trading in securities (as defined below) of any company, including Better, while in possession of material non-public information.
